description:
Restructure the Events page to make the CalendarView the primary navigation element.

## Requirements

### File: `src/app/events/page.tsx`

- Make the CalendarView the primary element (full-width, above the list)
- Move the "Create Event" button into the calendar header area
- Add a calendar header bar with:
  - View mode switcher (buttons: Month | Week | Day)
  - "Today" button
  - Prev/Next arrows
  - "New Event" button/CTA

### The existing event list (table/cards):
- Becomes secondary — shown below the calendar
- On desktop: visible below calendar
- On mobile: hidden behind a "Show List" toggle button
- Selecting/filtering in the list should sync with the calendar (e.g., scroll to date)

### Tests
- Calendar renders as primary element above the list
- "Create Event" is accessible from calendar header
- Mobile toggle shows/hides the list
- Navigation works between calendar and event list

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
